description:
## Component: hx-select (UPGRADE)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries**

Upgrade existing scaffold to production-grade dropdown with custom rendering, option groups, and Drupal Form API integration.

### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component)
Properties control selection state and validation. Slots provide Drupal control over options content. Options can be provided via slots (Drupal-rendered `<option>` elements) or via property.

### API Design

**Properties:**
- `name`, `value`, `required`, `disabled`
- `label`, `error`, `help-text`: string
- `placeholder`: string (shown when no selection)
- `multiple`: boolean (multi-select mode)
- `searchable`: boolean (filterable options)
- `hx-size`: sm | md | lg
- `open`: boolean (programmatic open)

**Slots:**
- Default slot: `<option>` and `<optgroup>` elements (Drupal controls options)
- `label`: Label text
- `help`: Help text
- `error`: Error message
- `prefix`: Icon before select display

**CSS Parts:** `select`, `listbox`, `option`, `label`, `help-text`, `trigger`

**Events:** `hx-change`, `hx-input` (for searchable mode) (composed: true)

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Drupal controls options via slot — CMS-driven select #}
<hx-select name="relationship" label="Relationship" required>
  <option value="">- Select -</option>
  <option value="spouse">Spouse</option>
  <option value="parent">Parent</option>
  <option value="sibling">Sibling</option>
  <option value="child">Child</option>
  {% for term in custom_terms %}
    <option value="{{ term.id }}">{{ term.label }}</option>
  {% endfor %}
</hx-select>
```
Options are slot-driven — Drupal TWIG renders `<option>` elements from taxonomy terms, entity references, or static lists. Component provides the dropdown UI, keyboard navigation, and form integration.

### ElementInternals: Full form participation

### Healthcare Use Cases
- Department/facility selection
- Insurance provider dropdown
- Relationship type (emergency contact)
- ICD-10 code category selection

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Renders custom dropdown (not native `<select>`) for consistent cross-browser styling
2. `<option>` and `<optgroup>` elements work in default slot
3. Searchable mode filters visible options
4. Multiple mode allows multi-selection with tag display
5. Keyboard: ArrowUp/Down navigate, Enter selects, Escape closes
6. ElementInternals form participation
7. WCAG 2.1 AA: listbox role, aria-expanded, option roles
title: T1-08: hx-select — Dropdown Selection
